processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'VoucherBook', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @fields nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end -- Check alter table @@table alter column ma_nk char(32) create index i on @@table (ma_nk) if @type = '0' delete @@table where ma_nk in (select ma_nk from v20dmnk) select @field = 'ma_nk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nk like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; select a.* into #k from @@table a join v20dmnk b on a.ma_nk = b.ma_nk delete @@table where ma_nk in (select ma_nk from #k) -- select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_nk <> b.ma_nk and a.ma_nk =rtrim(b.ma_nk)' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, v20dmnk b with (index(PK_v20dmq)) where a.ma_nk = rtrim(b.ma_nk)&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from v20dmnk a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_nk = rtrim(b.ma_nk)' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; -- Insert select @q = 'insert into v20dmnk(ma_nk, ten_nk, ten_nk2,ma_dvcs,ky_hieu,so_seri,so_ct1,so_ct2,so_ct0,m_trung_so,ngay_ph,ngay_hl_tu,ngay_hl_den, status,datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2)' select @q = @q + 'select ma_nk, ten_nk, ten_nk2,ma_dvcs,ky_hieu,so_seri,so_ct1,so_ct2,so_ct0,m_trung_so,ngay_ph,ngay_hl_tu,ngay_hl_den, status, getdate(), getdate(), rtrim(@@userID), rtrim(@@userID) from @@table' exec sp_executesql @q if @type = '1' begin update v20dmnk set ten_nk = b.ten_nk, ten_nk2 = b.ten_nk2, ma_dvcs=b.ma_dvcs,ky_hieu=b.ky_hieu,so_seri=b.so_seri,so_ct0=b.so_ct0, so_ct1=b.so_ct1, so_ct2=b.so_ct2,m_trung_so=b.m_trung_so,ngay_ph=b.ngay_ph,ngay_hl_tu=b.ngay_hl_tu, ngay_hl_den=b.ngay_hl_den, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID from v20dmnk a, #k b where a.ma_nk = b.ma_nk end
